title: codereview: lichen_identity_ygg_addr_from_ed25519 stub zeros high bytes instead of computing SHA512
description: In link_ctx.c:612-614, non-MONOCYPHER path memsets hash to 0. This breaks match with Rust yggdrasil_addr_from_pubkey and test vectors. Use conditional compile or provide SHA512 stub that matches test expectation. File as codereview per task.
